steps.instruction:
*🔐 Step 1: Get IT Approval First (MANDATORY)*
• You MUST get permission from the IT team before installing ANY software on a company machine.
• Raise a request to the IT Helpdesk specifying you need Lightshot.
• Do NOT proceed with installation until IT confirms approval.
_Expected: You receive IT approval confirmation._

*📥 Step 2: Download Lightshot*
• Once approved, download the setup file from:
`https://app.prntscr.com/en/download.html`
• Save the file locally.
_Expected: Download finishes._

*🖱️ Step 3: Installation Instruction*
• Download Lightshot for Windows.
_Expected: Step 3 is completed._

*⚙️ Step 4: Installation Instruction*
• Run the installer.
_Expected: Step 4 is completed._

*🔑 Step 5: Installation Instruction*
• Select your language and accept the agreement.
_Expected: Step 5 is completed._

*✅ Step 6: Installation Instruction*
• Once installed, press 'Print Screen' on your keyboard to use it.
_Expected: Step 6 is completed._
